text: APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University Events Announcements Mandatory Disclosures Gallery Tenders Contact us English Events Announcements Mandatory Disclosures Gallery Tenders Contact us KTU - Examination (PG-Valuation) - Result Publication of MCA Integrated S1 (R,S) Examination December 2025 (2020 Scheme) Friday, June 19, 2026 It is hereby notified that the result of the following examination has been published. The detailed results are available under the Result tab on the University Website and in the Student and College login. MCA Integrated S1 (R,S) Examination December 2025 (2020 Scheme) Notification KTU - Examination - Valuation(UG) - Result publication of jury courses for B.Des S2/S4/S6 (2024 Scheme and 2019 Scheme Saturday, June 20, 2026 It is hereby notified that the results of the jury courses of B.Des S2/S4/S6 (2024 Scheme and 2019 Scheme) are published Notification PHD Admission Application Deadline Extension Saturday, June 20, 2026 The deadline for application to PhD admission 2026-27 has been extended to June 30. Supplementary Exam Registration to B.Tech S4 (S,FE) Exam May 2026 (2019 Scheme) Friday, June 12, 2026 It is hereby notified that the Supplementary Exam Registration to B.Tech S4 (S,FE) Exam May 2026 (2019 Scheme) is now open to the students, as detailed below. Notification APJAKTU - Examination (PG-Valuation) - Result Publication of MCA (Two Years) S4 (R,S) Examination May 2026 Friday, June 12, 2026 Notification SOAR 2026: Technical Education Conclave Organized by KTU for Engineering Aspirants and Their Parents Saturday, June 13, 2026 APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University (KTU) is organizing SOAR 2026 Students Orientation for Aspiration and Readiness, a district-level Technical Education Conclave, as part of its Academic Admissions 2026 outreach initiative. The conclave will be held on 15, 17, and 19 June 2026 across 30 engineering colleges in various districts of Kerala. SOAR 2026 Last Date for Submission of Course Duration Extension Requests B.Tech 2019 Scheme Students Extended up to 30-06-2026 (4.00 P.M.) Monday, June 8, 2026 Important Instructions This notification is applicable only to students admitted in the year 2019 and to students who were migrated from the 2015 Scheme to the 2019 Scheme during their regular academic period. ( No scheme migration requests will be considered under this notification). Students who have already submitted their Course Duration Extension requests on or before 31-05-2026 need not submit the request again. The validity of such requests has been automatically extended up to 30-06-2026 . Before applying for a Course Duration Extension, students shall verify the course completion date displayed in their profile. Students who have not yet submitted their requests shall do so on or before 30-06-2026, 4.00 P.M. Fees once remitted towards Course Duration Extension shall not be refunded under any circumstances. This notification does not apply to students whose course duration ends on or after 15-08-2026 KTU - Examination (PG-Valuation) - Publication of Results M.Tech S4 (R,S) Examination March 2026 (2022 scheme) and M.Tech S4 (WP) (R,S) Examination March 2026 Monday, June 15, 2026 It is hereby notified that the results of M.Tech S4 (R,S) Examination March 2026 (2022 scheme) and M.Tech S4 (WP) (R,S) Examination March 2026 are published herewith. The detailed results are available in Student / College login. Notification KTU - Academic - Approval of Curriculum and Syllabus Wednesday, June 17, 2026 M.Tech Programme in Logistics and Supply Chain Management College of Engineering Thalassery M.Tech 2022 Regulations Implemented M.Tech Manufacturing Engineering - KMCT College of Engineering -M. Tech 2022 Regulations- Implemented Order Order KTU - Examination (UG-Valuation) - B.Arch S10 (S,FE) Exam April 2026 (2016 Scheme) - Publication of Results Thursday, June 18, 2026 It is hereby notified that the results of B.Arch S10 (S,FE) Exam April 2026 (2016 Scheme) are published. The detailed results are available in Student and College login. Notification prev 1 2 3 ... 502 503 next Copyright@ APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University 2021
